scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix server
scripts.cf:deploy: node scripts/generate-production-config.mjs --require && wrangler d1 migrations apply ternssh --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run cf:deploy
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/generate-production-config.mjs --require && wrangler d1 migrations apply ternssh --remote

ACCESS_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to enable Cloudflare Access. Leave as `false` for open mode.
